value.body:
## Context

The user goal is to direct, approve, and perform the final merge from the Git branch after development. Cycle should make that final decision easy and safe.

## Outcome

Agent completion produces a merge-ready handoff with branch, diff summary, test evidence, risk notes, follow-up tickets, and exact merge instructions.

## Acceptance criteria

- Handoff is persisted on the ticket and visible from ticket detail and agent task detail.
- Handoff includes branch name, remote push status, commit sha(s), changed files summary, tests run, test results, screenshots/artifacts where available, and known limitations.
- UI provides copyable final merge commands and/or opens the branch in the configured Git host when available.
- Handoff clearly distinguishes merge-ready, needs-user-input, failed, and abandoned states.
- No PR creation is required for this ticket.
- Tests cover handoff persistence, rendering, and failed push/partial handoff states.

frontmatter.title: Create merge-ready branch handoff for user final review

value.title: Create merge-ready branch handoff for user final review
